title: `proc_prune` undefines connections / incorrect scheduling semantics optimisation

features.name: task inout argument with blocking assignment
features.description: Code should include a task with an inout logic argument that performs a blocking assignment to the argument

features.name: always_ff with NBA followed by inout task call followed by NBA
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with a non-blocking assignment, followed by a task call with an inout argument, followed by another non-blocking assignment using the same variable modified by the task

features.name: proc_prune optimization on always_ff with inout task
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block containing an inout task call pattern that triggers incorrect optimization when proc_prune pass is applied, disconnecting signal connections and causing undefined outputs
